goal: Creators sign up at landing.html to co-stream HB 002 to their followers

fan_funnel_separate.note: Fan campaigns (Founding Fan, Awareness, Consideration) are NOT the influencer staircase. Run influencer layers first.

L1_see_you.creator_job: Stop scrolling — remember hologram boxing exists for streamers

ads.headline: Calling All Influencers
tiktok_texts: Calling all streamers — live stream the first AI hologram boxing event.
Creators — your next co-stream is waiting. Would you walk inside?
ads.meta_message: Calling streamers & content creators. The world's first live AI hologram boxing experience is loading — built for Kick, Twitch, YouTube, and TikTok.

ads.headline: Would You Walk Inside?
tiktok_texts: Would you walk inside? Creators — stream hologram boxing live.
Something wild is behind that door. Streamers — this is your next event.
ads.meta_message: Would you walk inside? Creators — bring your audience into the tent. AI hologram boxers. Live. Front row energy.

ads.headline: The Future Is Here
tiktok_texts: THE FUTURE OF LIVE ENTERTAINMENT... stream it live.
Premium fight night energy — built for creators who go live.
ads.meta_message: The future of live entertainment. Tent, headsets, hologram boxers going live — made for streamers.

L2_get_curious.creator_job: Understand the co-stream opportunity — tent, live FX, Kick/Twitch

ads.headline: Stream the Tent — Live FX
tiktok_texts: Your chat controls the show — live interactive effects in the tent.
Kick & Twitch creators — stream hologram boxing with live FX.
ads.meta_message: Stream the tent — live interactive effects your audience can feel. Co-stream partnerships open.

ads.headline: Co-Stream on Kick & Twitch
tiktok_texts: Watch free on Kick & Twitch — or co-stream it with us.
Streamers: bring your chat ringside to hologram boxing.
ads.meta_message: Co-stream hologram boxing on Kick & Twitch. VIP access and brand ambassador roles for partners.

ads.headline: Inside the Hologram Tent
tiktok_texts: Dark tent. Glowing square. Wireframe boxers. Your audience watches in VR.
Show your followers what's inside — inflatable tent fight night.
ads.meta_message: Inside the hologram tent — fog, glowing fight square, Wave wireframe boxers. Content gold for live streamers.

L3_sign_up.creator_job: Apply now — open call, partner form, email capture
L3_sign_up.note: EXISTING — 6 TikTok ad groups, 24 ads. Meta partial (2 ad sets live, 4 scripted).

L4_come_back.creator_job: Retarget landing visitors — spotlight confirmed partners + finish application
L4_come_back.audience_note: Enable when pixel has landing visitors 7d excluding Lead. TikTok retarget list / Meta custom audience.

ads.headline: Creators Are Already In
tiktok_texts: Streamers who toured the tent say the content is insane — co-stream hologram boxing. Your turn. Sign up.
Confirmed creators are locking co-stream slots. Kick, Twitch, TikTok partners are in. Join the roster.
ads.meta_message: Creators on Kick, Twitch, and TikTok are locking partner slots. Reviews are wild — your co-stream slot is still open.

ads.headline: Streamer Slots Filling
tiktok_texts: Still thinking about co-streaming hologram boxing? Partner slots are filling — finish at hologramboxing.com.
You looked — streamer partner slots are filling. Finish your application now.
ads.meta_message: You visited — partner slots are filling. Finish your application for hologram boxing co-stream access.

ads.headline: Your Spot's Still Open
tiktok_texts: Your co-stream partner slot is still open. Open call live — finish at hologramboxing.com.
You looked — open call's still live for Kick, Twitch, and TikTok creators. Finish your signup.
ads.meta_message: You checked us out — your co-stream partner slot is still open. Finish your application for hologram boxing.

ads.headline: That Ad Was Right
tiktok_texts: Saw our partner ad? It's real — streamers are locking co-stream slots. Finish at hologramboxing.com.
That creators-are-in ad wasn't fluff. Co-stream hologram boxing — finish your signup.
ads.meta_message: Saw the partner ad? It's true — creators are locking co-stream slots. Finish your application.

ads.headline: That Reminder Was Real
tiktok_texts: That reminder ad was right — partner slots are filling. Apply at hologramboxing.com.
You saw the slots-filling ad? Yeah it's real. Co-stream hologram boxing — sign up now.
ads.meta_message: That reminder ad was accurate — partner slots are filling. Don't wait — apply now.

ads.headline: The Open Call Is Real
tiktok_texts: Saw the open call ad? It's legit — they want co-stream creators. Finish at hologramboxing.com.
That open call wasn't clickbait. Hologram boxing wants streamers — your slot's still open.
ads.meta_message: The open call ad is real — hologram boxing wants co-stream creators. Finish your signup.

L5_show_up.creator_job: Countdown urgency — timer synced to HB 002, last partner slots
L5_show_up.audience_note: Turn on when HB 002 date is ≤14 days out. Sync with site countdown.

ads.headline: Countdown Is Live
tiktok_texts: Partner slots close when the countdown hits zero. Co-stream hologram boxing — lock your slot at hologramboxing.com.
Fight night countdown is live. Streamers — lock your co-stream slot before partner applications close.
ads.meta_message: Fight night countdown is live — partner co-stream slots closing. Timer synced with hologramboxing.com. Apply now.

ads.headline: Last Call for Streamers
tiktok_texts: LAST CALL — streamer partner slots closing. Co-stream hologram boxing before the roster locks. Sign up now.
Final call for Kick & Twitch creators — co-stream hologram boxing live. Partner applications closing soon.
ads.meta_message: Last call for streamers & creators. Partner slots closing — sign up before applications lock.

ads.headline: Open Call Closing Soon
tiktok_texts: Open call closing soon — stream hologram boxing live. Final co-stream partner slots. Apply now.
Creators — last chance to join the co-stream roster. VIP tent access. Sign up at hologramboxing.com.
ads.meta_message: Open call closing soon. Final co-stream partner slots for hologram boxing — VIP access, brand ambassador roles.

totals_when_complete.deployment_note: TikTok influencer staircase complete (PAUSED). Meta pending token refresh.
